_source: Forbidden Lands GM's Guide + Book of Beasts (user PDFs)

demon_form.effect: RUN is a slow action on land.
Not hurt by physical weapons. chapter5 B eS tIarY Robert Taylor (Order #41500780)

demon_ability.text: Slimy Can move through very small openings.
Covered by Sores Infectious Touch, Virulence D6+5
Filled by Light Fear attack D6+5
Transparent All attacks get a −3 penalty
Covered by Eyes Draw one extra initiative card, discard the worst one.
No Eyes Draw one extra initiative card, discard the best one.

demon_attack.text: Claws D6+4 Roll a D6. 1-2: Damage 1, 3-5: Arm's Length Damage 2, 6: Damage 3
Teeth D6+5 Roll a D6. 1-2: Damage 1, 3-5: Arm's Length Damage 2, 6: Damage 3
Horn D6+6 Roll a D6. 1-4: Damage 2, 5-6: Arm's Length Damage 3
Tentacles D6+4 Roll a D6. 1-2: Damage 1, 3-6: Near Damage 2. Then GRAPPLED chapter5 B eS tIarY Robert Taylor (Order #41500780)
Fire D6+6 The victim continues to take 1 Near point of damage every round until the fire is put out with a MOVE roll.
Cold D6+5 The victim also instantly becomes Near COLD.
Roar — Fear attack: strength D3+6 Near
Killing — Fear attack: strength D6+5 Near Gaze
Heavy D6+5 Roll a D6. 1: Longsword, 2: Two- Arm's Length Weapon handed sword, 3: Heavy warham- mer, 4: Morningstar, 5: Two- handed axe, 6: Trident

demon_strength.text: Immune to weapons Only unarmed attacks and spells can hurt the demon.
Immune to fire Cannot be hurt by fire.
Immune to cold Cold has no effect.
Lightning fast Draws two initiative cards and gets to act on both turns.
Immune to physical Physical attacks are ineffective. attacks
Parasite By touching its victim, the demon can take control over it. This works as the PUPPETEER spell with Power Level 3.
Regenerative Regains D3 Strength every round. chapter5 B eS tIarY Robert Taylor (Order #41500780)
Paralyzing A victim touched by the demon is affected by a paralyzing poison with Potency D6+5.
Poisonous A victim touched by the demon is affected by a lethal poison with Potency D6+5.
Shapeshifter Can change shape into any creature. The copy is perfect except for one small detail (such as eye color).
Immaterial Can move through solid matter.
Floating Does not touch the ground. Can float up to
Teleportation Can instantly teleport to anywhere within LONG range every other round.

demon_weakness.text: Water Suffers D3 damage when splashed by water.
Fire Takes double damage from fire.
Cold Takes double damage from cold.

Light Sensitive to light and must move away from strong light sources. If not possible, takes D3 damage from a minor light source (such as a torch) and D6 damage from a major light source (such as the sun) every round.
Silver Takes double damage from weapons made of silver.
Gold Takes double damage from weapons made of gold.
Children Cannot stand the sight of children and must move away from them. If unable to do so, the demon takes D3 damage every round.
Elves Cannot stand the sight of elves and must move away from them. If unable to do so, the demon takes D3 damage every round. chapter5 B eS tIarY Robert Taylor (Order #41500780)
Dwarves Cannot stand the sight of dwarves and must move away from them. If unable to do so, the demon takes D3 damage every round.
Holy Cannot stand the sight of holy symbols and must move Symbols away from them. If unable to do so, the demon takes D3 damage every round.
Music Cannot stand the sound of music or melodies and must move away from the sound. If unable to do so, the demon takes D3 damage every round.
Soil Takes D3 damage from contact with soil.
Wood Takes double damage from weapons made of wood.
